free_text: natural 16O gaseous target, isolated from beam tube
by nickel foil 9x10-5cm, pressure 25 to 150 torr
Plastic scintillator 5.1 cm thick and 12.7 cm

Detector was placed in lead and Li-loaded paraffin
colimator. A 1.27 cm thick lead plate in front of

Beam pulsed by a 3.5 MHz chopper produced 100 -
200 nA averaged current, with pulse width of 2 ns
